title: Process Hijacking via pidfd: Stealing File Descriptors for Post-Exploitation Shells
excerpt: A technique for stealing file descriptors across process boundaries using Linux pidfd syscalls for post-exploitation shells on Android.

title: CVE-2025-61765: RCE in Socket.IO via Pickle Deserialization
excerpt: A Remote Code Execution vulnerability in python-socketio affecting multi-server deployments using message brokers. Caused by insecure deserialization where the library blindly unpickles data from shared message channels.

title: Elixir Cross Referencer: Indexing and Auditing Source Code
excerpt: Explore source code in your browser - Particularly useful for the Linux kernel and other low-level projects in C/C++. A guide to setting up your own Elixir instance.

title: CVE-2024-22857: Arbitrary Code Execution in zlog
excerpt: Heap-based buffer overflow in zlog versions 1.1.0 to 1.2.17 in zlog_rule_new(). An attacker can exploit this vulnerability to overwrite the zlog_record_fn record_func function pointer to achieve arbitrary code execution.

title: Linux Kernel Compilation and Adding a Custom System Call
excerpt: We can make changes to the Linux kernel and compile it to make a custom copy. Learn how to compile a kernel, add a custom system call, write a wrapper function, and create a man page.
